# line1TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display on the top row.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var line1TextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display on the bottom row.
